name: area-sdk
description: Public Python SDK, client facade, session API, or typed models.

name: area-runtime
description: Runtime API, policy, memory service, auth, or deployment shell.

name: area-query
description: Query planning, retrieval, Cypher, routing, or answer synthesis.

name: area-indexing
description: Indexing, extraction, graph shaping, linking, or ingestion.

name: area-ontology
description: Ontology model, FIBO, governance, reasoning, or validation.

name: area-docs
description: README, QUICKSTART, docs, tutorials, or contributor guidance.

name: area-examples
description: Examples, sample data, run specs, or public tutorials.

name: area-ci
description: GitHub Actions, CI scripts, release automation, or repo ops.

name: area-connector
description: External connectors such as Slack, Notion, Obsidian, or data APIs.

name: area-observability
description: Tracing, Opik, OpenTelemetry, metrics, or evaluation telemetry.

name: area-website
description: Docs website, blog, Starlight, or Pages deployment.

name: area-security
description: Security-sensitive behavior, vulnerability policy, or disclosure path.

name: area-community
description: Discord, contributor communication, support, or community operations.

name: kind-bug
description: A reproducible defect or regression.

name: kind-feature
description: A new user-facing capability or supported workflow.

name: kind-docs
description: Documentation, examples, quickstarts, or onboarding copy.

name: kind-test
description: Test coverage, fixtures, or validation-only changes.

name: kind-ci
description: CI, repository automation, release automation, or labels.

name: kind-refactor
description: Internal restructuring without intended behavior change.

name: kind-perf
description: Performance, memory, throughput, or latency work.

name: kind-maintenance
description: Maintenance, chores, dependency hygiene, or repo cleanup.

name: kind-release
description: Release planning, release notes, package publishing, or announcement work.

name: status-needs-triage
description: Needs maintainer triage before work starts or merges.

name: status-needs-repro
description: Bug report needs a smaller reproduction or failing command.

name: status-needs-design
description: Needs design discussion, ADR, or acceptance criteria.

name: urgency-now
description: Needs immediate maintainer attention.

name: urgency-this-sprint
description: Candidate for the current sprint.

name: urgency-next-sprint
description: Candidate for the next sprint.

name: urgency-later
description: Backlog item without near-term urgency.

name: sprint-current
description: Committed or strongly targeted for the current sprint.

name: sprint-next
description: Candidate for the next sprint.

name: sprint-backlog
description: Tracked backlog item with no active sprint commitment.

name: roadmap-enterprise-context
description: Enterprise context graph, connector, or organizational memory roadmap.

name: roadmap-obsidian-kg
description: Obsidian, local knowledge graph, skill, or plugin workflow roadmap.

name: roadmap-agent-runtime
description: Agent runtime, distributed agents, orchestration, or LiteLLM roadmap.

name: roadmap-scalability
description: Scalability, distributed systems, benchmarks, or production hardening.

name: roadmap-docs
description: Public docs, onboarding, examples, and open-source contributor roadmap.

name: impact-critical
description: Critical user, security, or production impact.

name: impact-high
description: High product, user, or maintainer impact.

name: impact-medium
description: Medium impact.

name: impact-low
description: Low impact or cosmetic improvement.

name: sev-critical
description: Critical severity defect.

name: sev-high
description: High severity defect.

name: sev-medium
description: Medium severity defect.

name: sev-low
description: Low severity defect.
